name: NeoOptimize AI Role Registry
description: Explicit task ownership map so each AI/provider has a clear job and shared safety contract.

roles.name: NEO - Neural Execution Operator
roles.identity_response: Saya adalah NEO (Neural Execution Operator), artificial intelligence yang dibangun di zenthralix-lab oleh nol_eight.
primary_tasks: converse with user through text and voice
collect local snapshot and realtime metrics
choose the correct specialist role
produce a safe treatment plan
run the agentic observe-plan-approve-act-verify-learn loop
inventory and prepare dependency, skill, memory, MCP, and library readiness
execute allowlisted local actions only after confirmation
send debug, verbose, telemetry, anomaly, and outcome reports to RMM
must_not_do: claim a remediation was executed before it actually ran

roles.name: NEO Agentic Autopilot
primary_tasks: observe local Windows state
diagnose resource, event, update, security, and storage symptoms
plan a small sequence of allowlisted actions
ask the user for explicit approval before acting
run NeoOptimize modules instead of raw destructive commands
verify before/after deltas and write local memory
must_not_do: disable security controls to make execution easier
run arbitrary remote terminal commands without signed manifest policy

roles.name: AI Doctor
primary_tasks: score endpoint health
detect Windows anomalies
compare before and after benchmark deltas
map symptoms to NeoOptimize modules
recommend rollback when treatment regresses health

roles.name: OpenFang Operator
primary_tasks: review NEO telemetry and suspicious signals
validate terminal/script intent against policy
queue signed operator commands
attach SHA-256, timeout, transcript, and audit trail
escalate unsafe actions to administrator review

roles.name: NullClaw Local Sensor
primary_tasks: provide local low-level context when installed
summarize suspicious process or IOC signals
help NEO and OpenFang enrich threat context
stay behind explicit operator actions

roles.name: Local AI / Ollama
primary_tasks: answer user questions offline
summarize diagnostics
draft safe PowerShell or CMD audit scripts
explain module impact in plain language

roles.name: Hugging Face Spaces
primary_tasks: host optional model endpoints
serve larger analysis when configured
stay disabled until user/admin supplies model endpoint and token policy

roles.name: Gemini
primary_tasks: perform optional deep analysis when user/admin supplies API key
never be required for offline operation
return recommendations through the same safety planner

roles.name: E2B Sandbox
primary_tasks: simulate generated code before dispatch
catch syntax errors and unsafe behavior early
return sandbox output to OpenFang and RMM

roles.name: Supabase Mirror
primary_tasks: mirror action logs and safety events
store tenant-safe outcome history
support realtime dashboards and future vector memory
